examples: In response to declining math skills among their students, some Japanese schools are bringing back an ancient calculating device—the abacus.
The abacus was perhaps the earliest type of computer.
Learn how to use an abacus.
The Abacus 2006 is a significant advance over the first generation of MSN Direct watches.
The SEC enforcement action deals with only one so-called Abacus CDO, but there were others.
